name: music-source-smtc
rename_rationale: Renamed per ledger-diff-v2 IP1 -> Windows-only and probe-windows-nowplaying recommendation (opt-A: PowerShell+WinRT SMTC). Section.id 'S5' preserved for DAG stability.

builders.task: Produce plugin/music_source.js with getNowPlaying() async function spawning osascript (v1; macOS).
Rewrite plugin/music_source.js to spawn powershell.exe with inline WinRT SMTC script. Preserve C-S4-S5 surface and dev-002 MUSIC_SOURCE_FIXTURE shim verbatim.

AA.S5.1.note: Fixture 'Bohemian Rhapsody\tQueen' resolves to {title:'Bohemian Rhapsody', artist:'Queen'}.

AA.S5.2.note: Empty and no-tab fixtures both return null; module never throws (Promise resolves to null on error).

AA.S5.3.note: Uses child_process.execFile with 'powershell.exe'; no 'osascript' reference; sync invocation does not throw.

AA.S5.4.note: All 4 SMTC literals present: GlobalSystemMediaTransportControlsSessionManager, Windows.Media.Control, TryGetMediaPropertiesAsync, PlaybackStatus.

MCA.TDIPD.1.note: spawns powershell.exe + tab-delimited parsing + resolve-null-on-empty confirmed.

MCA.TDIPD.2.note: All 4 SMTC literals present in source string.
